data.title: Meridian Mining Raises C$57.5 Million to Accelerate Cabaçal Growth Strategy
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Meridian Mining SE ( (TSE:MNO) ) just unveiled an update.

Meridian Mining has closed a C$57.5 million bought deal financing, issuing over 36 million common shares at C$1.58 each, including full exercise of the underwriters’ over-allotment option, with participation from an insider under Canadian related-party rules. The strengthened cash position, now exceeding C$100 million, will fund advancement of the Cabaçal gold-copper-silver definitive feasibility study, infrastructure and civil works, and expanded exploration across its Brazilian project belts, supporting an anticipated period of growth and reinforcing its ambition to build a leading VMS development hub in South America.

The financing was led by a syndicate of Canadian investment banks and remains subject to final Toronto Stock Exchange approval, with shares distributed via a prospectus in key Canadian provinces and under exemptions in select foreign jurisdictions. Insider participation did not trigger formal valuation or minority approval requirements due to its size relative to market capitalization, signalling internal confidence in the company’s strategy while modestly increasing insider ownership without altering governance dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MNO) stock is a Hold with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Meridian Mining SE stock, see the TSE:MNO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MNO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MNO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by very weak financial performance (no reported revenue, sizeable losses, and ongoing cash burn), partially offset by a debt-free balance sheet with improved equity. Technicals and recent positive project/regulatory milestones support near-term sentiment, but valuation is constrained by negative earnings and the lack of a dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MNO stock, click here.

More about Meridian Mining SE

Meridian Mining plc is a mining exploration and development company focused on volcanogenic massive sulphide gold-copper-silver projects in Brazil, particularly the advanced-stage Cabaçal project in the state of Mato Grosso. The company is also pursuing regional exploration across the Cabaçal VMS Belt and the Jauru, Araputanga and Espigão belts to expand its resource base and support a broader hub strategy in the region.

Average Trading Volume: 603,135

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$707.5M

data.title: International Paper Corrects RSU Tax Withholding Figures in Executive Share Vesting Update
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

International Paper Co ( (IP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

International Paper has corrected an earlier disclosure on the vesting of 2023 and 2024 Long-Term Incentive Plan restricted stock units for senior executives, updating the number of shares withheld from Executive Vice President Timothy S. Nicholls to meet tax obligations. The restated figures reflect additional shares retained after federal taxes were properly applied to his expatriate assignment, while separate notifications confirm RSU vesting and tax-related share sales for executives W. Thomas Hamic and Joseph R. Saab, underscoring routine equity compensation and compliance with UK market abuse reporting rules.

The company detailed that RSUs granted in 2023 and 2024 vested on 1 February 2026, with shares either withheld or sold on 2 February 2026 at a reference price of $40.32 to satisfy individual tax liabilities. While the transactions do not alter International Paper’s capital strategy, they clarify prior administrative errors and provide transparency to investors about executive equity awards and associated tax handling.

More about International Paper Co

International Paper Company, listed on the NYSE and LSE, is a global leader in sustainable packaging solutions. The company focuses on producing fiber-based packaging and related paper products for customers across North America, Europe, the Middle East and Africa, positioning itself as a key supplier in the global packaging value chain.

Learn more about IP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Place Holdings Directors Placed on SGX RegCo Watchlist Over AGM Delays
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Place Holdings Limited ( (SG:E27) ) has provided an announcement.

The Place Holdings Limited has come under heightened regulatory scrutiny as the Singapore Exchange Regulation has placed several members of its board on the Directors’ and Executive Officers’ Watchlist. This action follows the company’s failure to comply with a directive to regularise the holding of its overdue annual general meetings for the 2023 and 2024 financial years by 11 February 2026.

With effect from 12 February 2026, Executive Chairman Ji Zenghe, CEO and Executive Director Fan Xianyong, Lead Independent Director Chng Hee Kok and Independent Director Foo Chiah‑Shiung have all been placed on the watchlist. The move signals SGX RegCo’s concern over the company’s corporate governance and regulatory compliance, and may raise questions among investors and other stakeholders about board oversight and the timeliness of the group’s financial reporting and shareholder communications.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:E27) stock is a Hold with a S$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Place Holdings Limited stock, see the SG:E27 Stock Forecast page.

More about Place Holdings Limited

The Place Holdings Limited is a Singapore-incorporated investment holding company with operations conducted through its subsidiaries, collectively referred to as the Group. It is listed on the Singapore Exchange and is subject to regulatory oversight by SGX RegCo regarding its corporate governance and timely convening of annual general meetings.

Current Market Cap: S$23.52M

data.title: RUSAL Discloses Termination of SUAL Partners’ Voting Rights
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has provided an update.

United Company RUSAL has disclosed that SUAL Partners International Limited Liability Company has lost its direct right to dispose of a certain number of votes attached to RUSAL’s voting shares. The termination concerns independent disposal rights and does not result in SUAL Partners retaining an indirect or joint voting stake of 5% or more in the company.

The notice, filed in Russia and cross-referenced to Hong Kong investors, signals a change in the company’s shareholder and voting control structure without naming any new controlling party. This adjustment may alter the balance of influence among existing shareholders and board-aligned stakeholders, though no immediate operational implications are indicated in the disclosure.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company incorporated in Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation, with its shares listed in Hong Kong and on Russian exchanges including Moscow Exchange and SPB Exchange. The group operates in the metals and mining sector, focusing on aluminium production and related industrial activities for global markets.

Learn more about 0486 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Stora Enso Oyj has disclosed an ownership notification related to BlackRock, Inc. and its chain of controlled undertakings, indicating that multiple BlackRock entities collectively hold a stake in Stora Enso that remains below the 5% threshold. The filing lists numerous BlackRock subsidiaries across several jurisdictions, underscoring that the asset manager’s exposure to Stora Enso is diversified through various legal entities but does not cross a major ownership disclosure threshold that would signal a larger strategic position.

data.title: Maris-Tech Wins U.S. Pilot Contract for AI-Driven Infantry Fighting Vehicle Upgrade
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Maris-Tech Ltd. ( (MTEK) ) is now available.

On February 12, 2026, Maris-Tech Ltd. announced it has been awarded a pilot contract by a U.S. customer to support an Infantry Fighting Vehicle modernization program with its AI-based edge computing systems. The pilot will combine the company’s Diamond Ultra situational awareness platform and Peridot Night panoramic day and thermal imaging system to give crews a unified, real-time 360° operational picture for both the vehicle and its weapon system.

The solution fuses multiple day and thermal sensors at the vehicle edge, enabling real-time detection of ground and aerial threats and allowing upgrades to existing and next-generation vehicles without major structural changes. Management says this pilot underscores growing opportunities in vehicle modernization programs and could pave the way for broader adoption of Maris-Tech’s technologies as armed forces enhance their fleets, potentially strengthening the company’s position in the defense AI and video intelligence market.

The most recent analyst rating on (MTEK) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Maris-Tech Ltd. stock, see the MTEK Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on MTEK stock, click here.

More about Maris-Tech Ltd.

Maris-Tech Ltd. is an Israeli provider of AI-powered edge video solutions for mission-critical defense and security operations, focused on real-time situational awareness, intelligence gathering and surveillance in bandwidth- and latency-constrained environments. Its rugged, SWaP-optimized platforms are deployed on UAVs, UGVs, armored vehicles and soldier systems, serving leading security organizations that require ultra-low-latency video processing and onboard AI analytics.

data.title: Prismo Metals Secures Permit and Contractor to Launch Drilling at Historic Silver King Project in Arizona
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Prismo Metals Inc. ( (TSE:PRIZ) ) has provided an update.

Prismo Metals has received U.S. Forest Service approval to begin a fully funded Phase 1 diamond drilling program at its historic Silver King silver project in Arizona’s Copper Belt, moving the asset from surface exploration into active subsurface testing. The permit allows drilling from multiple pads to test the upper portion of the steeply plunging, pipe-like mineralized body that was historically mined over about 300 meters of depth, as well as additional high-priority targets identified in recent work.

Mobilization to site is scheduled for February 20, 2026, with approximately 1,000 meters of initial drilling in nine holes and the potential for follow-up drilling to probe deeper levels and adjacent mineralized zones. By engaging experienced contractor Godbe Drilling and advancing the first comprehensive drill campaign at a historic high-grade producer located just 3.4 kilometers from the major Resolution Copper joint venture, Prismo aims to validate remaining high-grade potential and elevate the project’s strategic profile for investors and regional stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PRIZ) stock is a Sell with a C$0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prismo Metals Inc. stock, see the TSE:PRIZ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:PRIZ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:PRIZ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and funding dependence) despite a low-debt balance sheet and some improvement in cash burn. Technical indicators are mixed-to-neutral, and valuation is difficult to justify due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:PRIZ stock, click here.

More about Prismo Metals Inc.

Prismo Metals Inc. is a mining exploration company focused on advancing precious and base metal projects in North America, including its Silver King, Ripsey and Hot Breccia projects in Arizona and the Palos Verdes silver project in Mexico. The company targets high-grade silver and associated metals in prolific mining belts, positioning itself near established operations and world-class deposits to enhance the strategic value of its exploration portfolio.

data.title: Heritage Mining Confirms Visible Gold, Expanding Potential at Melba Project
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Heritage Mining Ltd. ( (TSE:HML) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Heritage Mining has confirmed visible coarse gold in diamond drill hole ML3900-002 at its Melba Project, at 73.3 metres downhole and outside a previously reported high-grade interval of 42.57 grams per tonne over one metre. The company says this new observation indicates potential to expand the mineralized zone near historic Melba Mine workings, enhancing the project’s exploration upside within a prolific gold-producing district.

The core-hosted visible gold occurs within a sheared, quartz-veined meta-rhyolitic volcaniclastic unit near key lithological contacts, reinforcing the geological model for a mineralized quartz vein array system at Melba. Heritage also emphasized its stringent QA/QC protocols and use of ISO-accredited PhotonAssay analysis at Paragon Geochemical in Timmins, aiming to ensure reliable assay results as it advances drilling and prepares further exploration updates for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HML) stock is a Hold with a C$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Heritage Mining Ltd. stock, see the TSE:HML Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:HML Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:HML is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very poor financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, ongoing cash burn) and a sharply weakened balance sheet with equity nearly eliminated and high leverage. Technicals provide some offset due to the stock trading above key moving averages, but the overbought RSI reduces confidence. Valuation offers limited support given the negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:HML stock, click here.

More about Heritage Mining Ltd.

Heritage Mining Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in Northeastern Ontario. Its flagship Melba Project, covering roughly 3,886 hectares near Kirkland Lake and Timmins along the Ross Fault in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt, is positioned close to several historic and development-stage gold mines, underscoring its regional exploration potential.

data.title: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals Regains Nasdaq Listing Compliance Status
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ( (SXTP) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 20, 2026, 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals received notice from Nasdaq that its common stock and warrants were subject to delisting for failing to maintain a minimum bid price of $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days, prompting the company to request an appeal and temporarily stay the suspension of trading. On February 11, 2026, Nasdaq informed the company that it had regained compliance with the minimum bid price requirement, leading to the cancellation of a February 19, 2026 hearing and confirming that its common stock will continue to be listed and traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

The reversal of the delisting determination removes an immediate threat to 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals’ market listing status and trading liquidity. This resolution stabilizes the company’s position on the Nasdaq Capital Market, which can support investor confidence and access to capital while closing out the compliance matter without further proceedings.

The most recent analyst rating on (SXTP) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. stock, see the SXTP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SXTP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SXTP is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak fundamentals (outsized losses and ongoing cash burn) and a significant Nasdaq delisting risk. Technical signals are comparatively supportive, but valuation is constrained by continued unprofitability and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on SXTP stock, click here.

More about 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company whose common stock and warrants trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company operates within the public equity markets framework and is subject to Nasdaq’s listing standards, including minimum bid price requirements for continued listing of its securities.

Sino Harbour Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:1663) ) has provided an update.

Sino Harbour Holdings Group Limited announced that its chairman, chief executive officer and substantial shareholder, Wong Lam Ping, has increased his stake in the company through on-market purchases. On 12 February 2026, Wong bought a total of 8,644,000 ordinary shares at an average price of about HK$0.083 per share, with the highest price paid at HK$0.083.
